rationale: Section 31.10 governs tax collector reporting and remittance procedures. It is agnostic to exemption amounts and would continue to operate unchanged regardless of the homestead exemption level.
quote: Each month the collector of taxes for a taxing unit shall prepare and submit to the governing body of the unit a written report made under oath accounting for all taxes collected for the unit during the preceding month.
_note: No conflict identified. §31.10 addresses reporting mechanics, not exemption thresholds or tax calculation.
